content: You can re-enable {{aiServices}} at any time. Are you sure you want to continue?

comment.text: This key provides the confirmation text displayed within a dialog when a user is disabling AI services. It informs the user that the AI services can be re-enabled later and asks for confirmation to proceed with the disablement. The text includes a placeholder for the name of the AI services, which will be populated from the "Common:AIServices" translation key.
